# FreeTool

A premium, privacy-first suite of online utility tools. All tools are designed to operate purely on the client-side using JavaScript, which means all file conversion, generation, and processing are done 100% locally in the user's browser. No data or files are ever uploaded to external servers, guaranteeing absolute privacy and security.

- Website: https://www.freetool.dev
- Supported Languages: English (default), Portuguese (pt), Spanish (es), French (fr), Italian (it), Indonesian (id), German (de), Dutch (nl).

## PDF Tools
Secure, local PDF manipulation utility suite.

- [PDF to Image](/pdf-to-image) | [Português](/pt/pdf-para-imagem) | [Español](/es/pdf-a-imagen): Converts PDF pages locally into high-quality JPG or PNG images.
- [Image to PDF](/image-to-pdf) | [Português](/pt/imagem-para-pdf) | [Español](/es/imagen-a-pdf): Combines multiple JPG, JPEG, or PNG images into a single PDF document.
- [PDF Editor](/pdf-editor) | [Português](/pt/editor-de-pdf) | [Español](/es/editor-de-pdf): Client-side PDF editing, annotation, and form filling utility.
- [Split PDF](/pdf-splitter) | [Português](/pt/divisor-de-pdf) | [Español](/es/divisor-de-pdf): Splits a single PDF file into multiple separate PDFs page-by-page.
- [Number PDF](/numbering-pdf) | [Português](/pt/numerar-pdf) | [Español](/es/numerar-pdf): Adds custom page numbers to a PDF file locally with advanced formatting and positioning.

## Random Data Generators
Dummy data and developer testing utility generators.

- [CPF Generator](/cpf-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-cpf) | [Español](/es/generador-de-cpf): Generates valid Brazilian CPF numbers (formatted or plain) for software testing, with option to select specific states/regions.
- [CNPJ Generator](/cnpj-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-cnpj) | [Español](/es/generador-de-cnpj): Generates valid Brazilian CNPJ numbers (formatted or plain) for software testing.
- [RG Generator](/rg-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-rg) | [Español](/es/generador-de-rg): Generates valid Brazilian RG (Identity Card) numbers for software testing.
- [Credit Card Generator](/credit-card-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-cartao-de-credito) | [Español](/es/generador-de-tarjeta-de-credito): Generates valid dummy credit card numbers with CVV and expiration dates for payment gateway testing.
- [Password Generator](/password-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-senha) | [Español](/es/generador-de-contrasena): Creates strong, secure, and fully customizable random passwords locally.
- [UUID Generator](/uuid-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-uuid) | [Español](/es/generador-de-uuid): Generates random UUIDs (version 4) for software development and identification.
- [Birthday Generator](/birthday-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-aniversario) | [Español](/es/generador-de-cumpleanos): Generates realistic dummy birthdates within custom age ranges.
- [Random Number Generator](/random-number-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-numeros-aleatorios) | [Español](/es/generador-de-numeros-aleatorios): Generates single or multiple random numbers within custom ranges.
- [List Randomizer](/list-randomizer) | [Português](/pt/randomizador-de-lista) | [Español](/es/randomizador-de-lista): Shuffles lists of items or picks a random winner/item from a custom list.
- [Dice Roller](/dice-roller) | [Português](/pt/rolador-de-dados) | [Español](/es/tirador-de-dados): Rolls various types of virtual polyhedral dice (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, d100) for tabletop games and testing.

## Date & Time Tools
Accurate, client-side calendar and time calculation utilities.

- [Age Calculator](/age-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-idade) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-edad): Calculates exact age in years, months, weeks, days, hours, and minutes from a birth date.
- [Date Difference](/date-difference) | [Português](/pt/diferenca-de-datas) | [Español](/es/diferencia-de-fechas): Calculates the exact number of days, weeks, months, or years between two custom dates.
- [Date Time Difference](/date-time-difference) | [Português](/pt/diferenca-de-data-e-hora) | [Español](/es/diferencia-de-fecha-y-hora): Calculates the precise time difference between two dates and times down to the minute.
- [Future Date Calculator](/future-date-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-data-futura) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-fecha-futura): Adds a specific number of days, weeks, months, or years to a starting date.
- [Past Date Calculator](/past-date-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-data-passada) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-fecha-pasada): Subtracts a specific number of days, weeks, months, or years from a starting date.
- [Hours and Minutes Calculator](/hours-and-minutes-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-horas-e-minutos) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-horas-y-minutos): Adds or subtracts time durations (hours and minutes) to calculate totals.
- [Time Converter](/time-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-tempo) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-tiempo): Converts between time units (seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, years).
- [Time Difference](/time-difference) | [Português](/pt/diferenca-de-tempo) | [Español](/es/diferencia-de-tiempo): Calculates the time elapsed between two specific times.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](/unix-timestamp-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-timestamp-unix) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-timestamp-unix): Converts Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice-versa.
- [Moon Phase Today](/moon-phase) | [Português](/pt/fase-da-lua) | [Español](/es/fase-de-la-luna): Displays the current lunar phase, illumination percentage, and countdown to the next phase in real time based on date and hemisphere.

## Code & Developer Tools
Secure, local code formatters, minifiers, and utility converters for software engineers.

- [CSS Formatter](/css-formatter) | [Português](/pt/formatador-de-css) | [Español](/es/formateador-de-css): Beautifies and formats CSS code for enhanced readability and style standards.
- [CSS Minifier](/css-minifier) | [Português](/pt/minificador-de-css) | [Español](/es/minificador-de-css): Compresses and minifies CSS code to reduce file sizes for web production.
- [HTML Formatter](/html-formatter) | [Português](/pt/formatador-de-html) | [Español](/es/formateador-de-html): Beautifies and formats HTML code with proper hierarchical indentation.
- [HTML Minifier](/html-minifier) | [Português](/pt/minificador-de-html) | [Español](/es/minificador-de-html): Minifies HTML markup to optimize load times.
- [JavaScript Formatter](/javascript-formatter) | [Português](/pt/formatador-de-javascript) | [Español](/es/formateador-de-javascript): Formats JavaScript code with standard indentation rules.
- [JavaScript Minifier](/javascript-minifier) | [Português](/pt/minificador-de-javascript) | [Español](/es/minificador-de-javascript): Minifies and compresses JavaScript code.
- [JSON Formatter](/json-formatter) | [Português](/pt/formatador-json) | [Español](/es/formateador-json): Beautifies, formats, and validates JSON code locally with custom indentation.
- [GraphQL Formatter](/graphql-formatter) | [Português](/pt/formatador-de-graphql) | [Español](/es/formateador-de-graphql): Formats and indents GraphQL queries properly.
- [JSON Viewer](/json-viewer) | [Português](/pt/visualizador-de-json) | [Español](/es/visualizador-de-json): Formats, inspects, validates, and beautifies JSON data structures.
- [JSON to CSV Converter](/json-to-csv-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-json-para-csv) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-json-a-csv): Converts JSON data into clean CSV sheets.
- [JSON to XML Converter](/json-to-xml-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-json-para-xml) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-json-a-xml): Converts JSON data into structured XML markup.
- [XML to JSON Converter](/xml-to-json-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-xml-para-json) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-xml-a-json): Converts XML data into JSON objects.
- [CSV to JSON Converter](/csv-to-json-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-csv-para-json) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-csv-a-json): Converts CSV rows and tables into structured JSON lists.
- [LESS to CSS Converter](/less-to-css-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-less-para-css) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-less-a-css): Compiles LESS stylesheet code into clean standard CSS.
- [MD5 Hash Generator](/md5-hash-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-hash-md5) | [Español](/es/generador-de-hash-md5): Generates MD5 cryptographic hashes from plain text locally.
- [Bcrypt Generator](/bcrypt-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-bcrypt) | [Español](/es/generador-de-bcrypt): Generates and verifies secure bcrypt password hashes locally.
- [Crontab Generator](/crontab-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-crontab) | [Español](/es/generador-de-crontab): Visually builds crontab schedules and expressions.
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](/url-encoder-decoder) | [Português](/pt/codificador-decodificador-de-url) | [Español](/es/codificador-decodificador-de-url): Percent-encodes or decodes URLs and query parameters.
- [Number Base Converter](/number-base-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-base-numerica) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-base-numerica): Converts numbers between binary, octal, decimal, hexadecimal, and custom bases.

## Image & Design Tools
Secure, local graphic utilities for web designers and editors.

- [Compress Image](/image-compressor) | [Português](/pt/comprimir-imagem) | [Español](/es/comprimir-imagen): Compresses JPG, PNG, and WebP images locally while maintaining visual quality and aspect ratio.
- [Crop Image](/crop-image) | [Português](/pt/cortar-imagem) | [Español](/es/recortar-imagen): Crops images locally with responsive aspect ratio presets and custom sizing.
- [Resize Image](/resize-image) | [Português](/pt/redimensionar-imagem) | [Español](/es/redimensionar-imagen): Resizes images locally by adjusting width, height, or quality settings.
- [Blur Image](/blur-image) | [Português](/pt/desfoque-imagem) | [Español](/es/blur-image): Applies a blur effect locally (entire image or selectable region) to hide sensitive details or protect privacy.
- [QR Code Generator](/qrcode-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-qrcode) | [Español](/es/generador-de-codigo-qr): Generates customizable QR codes (text, URL, Wi-Fi) with custom colors and logo embedding.
- [Color Tools](/color-tools) | [Português](/pt/ferramentas-para-cores) | [Español](/es/herramientas-para-colores): Hub page for all color utilities.
- [Random Colors](/random-colors) | [Português](/pt/cores-aleatorias) | [Español](/es/colores-aleatorios): Generates random color palettes with HEX, RGB and HSL codes, ready to copy.
- [Image Colors](/dominant-colors-of-the-image) | [Português](/pt/cores-dominantes-da-imagem) | [Español](/es/colores-dominantes-de-la-imagen): Extracts the dominant color and a full palette from any uploaded image, processed locally.
- [Color Converter](/color-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-cores) | [Español](/es/convertidor-de-colores): Converts colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV and other formats instantly.
- [Color Combination](/color-combination) | [Português](/pt/combinacao-de-cores) | [Español](/es/combinacion-de-colores): Generates harmonious color palettes (analogous, triadic, complementary, etc.) from any base color.
- [Barcode Generator](/barcode-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-codigo-de-barras) | [Español](/es/generador-de-codigo-de-barras): Generates barcode images (CODE128, EAN, UPC, etc.) from numerical inputs.
- [Signature Maker](/signature-maker) | [Português](/pt/assinar-online) | [Español](/es/firma-online): Draws or types your digital signature directly in the browser, downloading as PNG with a white or transparent background.

## Text & Content Utilities
Local text parsing, scrubbing, styling, and formatting tools.

- [Text Counter](/text-counter) | [Português](/pt/contador-de-texto) | [Español](/es/contador-de-texto): Counts characters, words, paragraphs, lines, and estimates reading time.
- [Text Reader](/text-reader) | [Português](/pt/leitor-de-texto) | [Español](/es/lector-de-texto) | [Français](/fr/lecteur-de-texte) | [Italiano](/it/lettore-di-testo): Converts any plain text into audio read aloud locally in the browser with customizable speed, pitch, and voice engine.
- [Text Comparator](/text-comparator) | [Português](/pt/comparador-de-texto) | [Español](/es/comparador-de-texto): Compares two text blocks to highlight line-by-line or character-by-character differences.
- [Justify Text](/justify-text) | [Português](/pt/justificar-texto) | [Español](/es/justificar-texto): Justifies and aligns text blocks with a customizable line width, padding characters, and word-breaking options.
- [Text Converter](/text-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-texto) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-texto): Converts text case styles (lowercase, UPPERCASE, Title Case, camelCase, kebab-case, etc.).
- [Morse Code Converter](/morse-code-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-codigo-morse) | [Español](/es/convertidor-de-codigo-morse) | [Français](/fr/convertisseur-code-morse) | [Italiano](/it/convertitore-codice-morse) | [Indonesian](/id/konverter-kode-morse): Converts text to international Morse code and decodes Morse sequences back to plain text.
- [Text Generator](/text-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-texto) | [Español](/es/generador-de-texto): Generates custom lorem ipsum or random placeholder text.
- [Email Extractor](/email-extractor) | [Português](/pt/extrator-de-email) | [Español](/es/extractor-de-email): Extracts all valid email addresses from any block of text.
- [Invisible Character](/invisible-character) | [Português](/pt/caractere-invisivel) | [Español](/es/caracter-invisible): Generates and copies blank space characters (zero-width, braille spaces, etc.) for social media or formatting.
- [Fancy Letters](/fancy-letters) | [Português](/pt/letras-diferentes) | [Español](/es/letras-diferentes): Converts plain text into styled, aesthetic unicode fonts for social media bios.
- [ASCII Letter Generator](/ascii-letter-generator) | [Português](/pt/gerador-de-letras-ascii) | [Español](/es/generador-de-letras-ascii): Creates large text banners using creative ASCII art font styles.
- [Emoji Picker](/emoji-picker) | [Português](/pt/seletor-de-emoji) | [Español](/es/selector-de-emojis): Easily browses, searches, and copies emojis.
- [Kaomoji Picker](/kaomoji) | [Português](/pt/kaomoji) | [Español](/es/kaomoji): Browse and copy Japanese kaomoji emoticons.
- [Lenny Face Picker](/lenny-face) | [Português](/pt/lenny-face) | [Español](/es/lenny-face): Copy popular Lenny faces and text emoticons.
- [Symbol Picker](/symbol-picker) | [Português](/pt/seletor-de-simbolos) | [Español](/es/selector-de-simbolos): Browse and copy special characters, math signs, and symbols.
- [Text Repeater](/text-repeater) | [Português](/pt/repetidor-de-texto) | [Español](/es/repetidor-de-texto): Repeats text multiple times locally in the browser with customizable separators.

## Calculators & Math Utilities
Quick, offline math calculations and unit converters.

- [Percentage Calculator](/percentage-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-porcentagem) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-porcentaje): Performs various percentage calculations (increase, decrease, ratio, absolute value).
- [Simple Rule of Three Calculator](/simple-rule-of-three-calculator) | [Português](/pt/calculadora-de-regra-de-tres-simples) | [Español](/es/calculadora-de-regla-de-tres-simple): Solves direct or inverse simple rule of three proportions.
- [Roman Numerals Converter](/roman-numerals-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-numeros-romanos) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-numeros-romanos): Converts Arabic numbers to Roman numerals and vice-versa.
- [Length Converter](/length-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-comprimento) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-longitud): Converts between metric and imperial length units.
- [Storage Unit Converter](/storage-unit-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-unidades-de-armazenamento) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-unidades-de-almacenamiento): Converts data storage units (bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, etc.).
- [Temperature Converter](/temperature-converter) | [Português](/pt/conversor-de-temperatura) | [Español](/es/conversor-de-temperatura): Converts temperatures between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin.
